modules.title: Module 7: Context API and Global State

content.introduction: React is a popular JavaScript library for building user interfaces, particularly for web applications. This course covers the fundamentals of React, including components, state management, and more.

keyConcepts.title: Components
keyConcepts.description: Reusable building blocks for UI elements in React.

keyConcepts.title: JSX
keyConcepts.description: A syntax extension for JavaScript used in React to describe UI.

keyConcepts.title: Virtual DOM
keyConcepts.description: A lightweight representation of the DOM for efficient updates.

content.introduction: Python is the go-to language for AI and machine learning. This course teaches Python fundamentals tailored for AI applications, from basic syntax to advanced libraries.

keyConcepts.title: Python Syntax
keyConcepts.description: Basic rules and structure of Python programming.

keyConcepts.title: Data Structures
keyConcepts.description: Lists, dictionaries, and other data containers in Python.

keyConcepts.title: AI Libraries
keyConcepts.description: Essential libraries like NumPy, Pandas, and Scikit-learn for AI.

content.introduction: AI Ethics and Bias explores the moral implications of artificial intelligence, focusing on fairness, accountability, and responsible development of AI systems.

keyConcepts.title: Ethical AI
keyConcepts.description: Developing AI systems that align with human values and principles.

keyConcepts.title: Bias Mitigation
keyConcepts.description: Techniques to identify and reduce bias in AI algorithms.

keyConcepts.title: Responsible AI
keyConcepts.description: Ensuring AI development considers societal impact and ethical concerns.

course.title: PostgreSQL
course.subtitle: Learn PostgreSQL Database Fundamentals and SQL Operations

content.introduction: PostgreSQL is a powerful, open-source relational database system known for its reliability, robustness, and rich feature set. Learn the fundamentals of PostgreSQL database management and SQL operations.

keyConcepts.title: Relational Database
keyConcepts.description: Organize data in tables with relationships and structured queries.

keyConcepts.title: SQL Operations
keyConcepts.description: Master Create, Read, Update, and Delete operations on databases.

keyConcepts.title: Data Integrity
keyConcepts.description: Ensure data consistency and reliability with advanced PostgreSQL features.

lessons.title: AI vs ML vs Deep Learning

Module 1: Getting Started with React Native
